description: Create a Unit Group named 'Units of linear density' containing the units 'tex' (reference, factor 1.0), 'dtex' (factor 0.1), and 'denier' (factor 0.11111). Link this unit group to a new Flow Property named 'Linear density' and assign it to a new Product Flow named 'Polyester staple fiber'. Ensure all objects are correctly linked and saved in the database.
